user.title: Set up Whatsapper
user.description: Configure how Home Assistant reaches the local Whatsapper/Whatsappur add-on. Leave host_port empty to auto-detect.

hassio_confirm.title: Discovered add-on
hassio_confirm.description: Home Assistant discovered {addon}. Confirm or adjust the connection settings before creating the integration entry.

init.title: Whatsapper options
init.description: Update connection settings and heartbeat monitor configuration.

data.heartbeat_notify_targets: Notify targets on status change (comma-separated service names, e.g. notify.mobile_app_phone)

data_description.heartbeat_chat_name: Exact name of the WhatsApp chat where heartbeat messages are sent.
data_description.heartbeat_notify_targets: Comma-separated list of notify service names to call when connectivity state changes.

error.invalid_interval: Interval must be a whole number of minutes (minimum 1).

qr_required.title: WhatsApp login required
